REJECTION DETAILS:
  Code AD-1-4: AD-1-4
  Services affected: 1
    • 20/02/2026 | B00553 – D DIMERS/ FDPS

APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (AD-1-4):
DIAGNOSIS-SERVICE ALIGNMENT APPEAL: The diagnosis codes have been reviewed and corrected to accurately reflect the clinical picture. The corrected ICD-10 codes are consistent with the service provided. We request re-adjudication with the updated coding.
Supporting Documents: Updated clinical notes with correct ICD-10 codes, treatment rationale

  Code BE-1-4: BE-1-4
  Services affected: 1
    • 20/02/2026 | N00004 – CONSULTATION FEE (RESIDENT DR)

APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (BE-1-4):
PREAUTHORIZATION APPEAL: The service was provided without prior authorization due to clinical urgency / administrative oversight. We hereby submit a retroactive preauthorization request with full clinical justification as required under ART PreAuth Protocol Section: General Requirements. All supporting clinical documentation is attached.
Supporting Documents: Medical report, clinical notes, diagnosis confirmation, treatment plan

  Code MN-1-1: MN-1-1
  Services affected: 1
    • 20/02/2026 | B01512 – TROPONIN I ADV.

APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (MN-1-1):
CLINICAL JUSTIFICATION APPEAL: The service is clinically justified as evidenced by the attached medical records, diagnosis codes, and clinical pathway documentation. The service aligns with accepted Clinical Practice Guidelines (CPG) and was medically necessary for the patient's condition.
Supporting Documents: Lab results, clinical notes, CPG reference, medical necessity letter

FINANCIAL SUMMARY:
  Total Claimed: SAR 2,149.05
  Lines Rejected: 3
